free_text: Scattering of 34.4-MeV alpha particles by the Tin
isotopes
Department of Physics, Faculty of Science
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is solid.
160cm variable energy cyclotron at
Institute for Nuclear Study
E-RSL: the full width at half maximum of the elastic
peak of 120Sn
0.5mm thick p-n junction detector
To monitor the scattered alpha particles at an
angle of 30 degree with the beam direction
The uncertainty in the scattering angles is better
than 0.2 degree.
Optical potential parameter
See NRDF D2266 DATA,11 for detail.
ANG-CM is polar angle (c.m.) between beam and alpha
Target-thickness is 2.15 mg/cm2.
